---
title: "PREVENT-AD Biomarker Associations"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

clinical_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_clinical_raw.rds"))
lifestyle_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lifestyle_raw.rds"))
apoe <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_apoe.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_dat.rds"))
cogd_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_cogd_imp_scored.rds"))

ptau_217 <- PREVENTAD_dat$plasma_ptau217 %>%
  mutate(Candidate_Age = Candidate_Age/12)
ipms <- PREVENTAD_dat$plasma_4plex %>%
  mutate(Candidate_Age = Candidate_Age/12)
```


# Biomarker trajectories
## ptau 217
```{r}
plot1 <- ptau_217 %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=ptau217_simoa_UGOT, color=apoe_e4_status)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = CONP_ID), alpha = 0.05, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)",
       title = "p-tau217 Trajectories by APOE ε4 Status")

plot1
```

## ptau 181
```{r}
plot2 <- ipms %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=ptau181_simoa_UGOT, color=apoe_e4_status)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = CONP_ID), alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)",
       title = "p-tau181 Trajectories by APOE ε4 Status")

plot2
```

## amyloid beta ratio
```{r}
plot3 <- ipms %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=AB_ratio_simoa_4plex, color=apoe_e4_status)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = CONP_ID), alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "Amyloid beta ratio",
       title = "AB Ratio Trajectories by APOE ε4 Status")

plot3
```


## NfL
```{r}
plot4 <- ipms %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=NFL_simoa_4plex, color=apoe_e4_status)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = CONP_ID), alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "NfL (pg/mL)",
       title = "NfL Trajectories by APOE ε4 Status")

plot4
```


## GFAP
```{r}
plot5 <- ipms %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Candidate_Age, y=GFAP_simoa_4plex, color=apoe_e4_status)) +
  # indiv trajectories
  geom_line(aes(group = CONP_ID), alpha = 0.1, linewidth = 0.3) +
  # mean trajectories
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)",
       y = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
       title = "GFAP Trajectories by APOE ε4 Status")

plot5
```


# Biomarker associations (unadjusted)
## Family history:biomarkers (baseline)
```{r}
fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_fhx_dat.rds"))
baseline_dat <- fhx %>%
  left_join((ptau_217 %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((ipms %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID")

# ptau 217 (slightly >0.05)
model1 <- lm(ptau217_simoa_UGOT ~ family_members_AD,
             data=baseline_dat)
summary(model1)

# ptau 181 (>0.05)
model2 <- lm(ptau181_simoa_UGOT ~ family_members_AD,
             data=baseline_dat)
summary(model2)

# amyloid beta ratio (>0.05)
model3 <- lm(AB_ratio_simoa_4plex ~ family_members_AD,
             data=baseline_dat)
summary(model3)

# NfL (<0.05)
model4 <- lm(NFL_simoa_4plex ~ family_members_AD,
             data=baseline_dat)
summary(model4)

# GFAP
model5 <- lm(GFAP_simoa_4plex ~ family_members_AD,
             data=baseline_dat)
summary(model5)
```

## CogDrisk:biomarkers (baseline)
### ptau 181
```{r}
baseline_dat2 <- cogd_dat %>%
  left_join(baseline_dat, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score, ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT,
         AB_ratio_simoa_4plex, NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex,
             NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  )

plot1 <- baseline_dat2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = measure)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") + 
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       color = "APOE ε4 status",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and AD Blood-based Biomarker Levels in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_CogD_vs_BBM.png"), plot1)

# baseline_dat2 %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = score, y = ptau181_simoa_UGOT, color = apoe_e4_status)) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
#   labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
#        y = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)",
#        color = "APOE ε4 status",
#        title = "CogDrisk Score and p-tau181 by APOE Status") +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### ptau 217
```{r}
baseline_dat2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = ptau217_simoa_UGOT, color = apoe_e4_status)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)",
       color = "APOE ε4 status",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and p-tau217 by APOE Status") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### Amyloid beta ratio
```{r}
baseline_dat2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = AB_ratio_simoa_4plex, color = apoe_e4_status)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "AB ratio",
       color = "APOE ε4 status",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and AB ratio by APOE Status") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### NfL
```{r}
baseline_dat2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = NFL_simoa_4plex, color = apoe_e4_status)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "NfL (pg/mL)",
       color = "APOE ε4 status",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and NfL by APOE Status") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### GFAP
```{r}
baseline_dat2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = GFAP_simoa_4plex, color = apoe_e4_status)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#2E86AB", "#A23B72", "#F18F01")) +
  labs(x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
       color = "APOE ε4 status",
       title = "CogDrisk Score and GFAP by APOE Status") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

##
